# Talimogene Laherparepvec 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Talimogene Laherparepvec 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Talimogene Laherparepvec</strong> 目前有 <strong>24 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Talimogene Laherparepvec 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Imlygic is indicated for the treatment of adults with unresectable melanoma that is regionally or distantly metastatic (Stage IIIB, IIIC and IVM1a) with no bone, brain, lung or other visceral disease.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>CMM7（99.2%）</li>
<li>pediatric leptomeningeal melanoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell uveal melanoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>melanoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>glottis squamous cell carcinoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>lung occult squamous cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>rectal cloacogenic carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>gallbladder adenosquamous carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>non-small cell squamous lung carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>external ear basal cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/talimogene-laherparepvec/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
